title: Alberta Opposition leader, federal ministers react to premier's policy affecting transgender youth
notes: Primary source for EVT-032 opposition_response. NDP leader Rachel Notley held a Feb 1 news conference calling the policy 'cynical and cruel' and 'mean-spirited,' saying Smith was using it to 'distract' Albertans from provincial issues including health care and cost of living. MLA Janis Irwin said she was 'absolutely heartbroken.' Notley stated she believes 'a trans woman is a woman and a trans man is a man' and accused Smith of pandering to the most extremist element of her party's base. No byline surfaced on text article; video segment credits Ina Sidhu.
